generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab/
prefix base: http://example.org/base/
instance FirstVerticalAxisSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring time series data from the first vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance MABIMAXFirstAxisActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of the MABI MAX robot, coupled with cycloidal gear transmission system for precise torque transfer and motion control"
]
instance MqttSensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom FirstVerticalAxisSensors
]
instance JointFrictionWearPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of joint wear based on friction dynamics"
]
instance JointFrictionParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control parameters to enhance motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous, multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction for real-time monitoring and optimization of motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionWearPredictionInsight, JointFrictionParameterAdjustmentAction
]
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering across requirements, functional, logical, and technical layers",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance ACMEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for system components and interfaces",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for system components and interfaces",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for system composition and interconnections",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance SysMLStateMachinesEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for dynamic behavior",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for detailed dynamic simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for detailed behavior specification",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java for detailed behavior specification",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance JointFrictionSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series sensor data used for joint friction identification in the first vertical axis",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttSensorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, ACMEEnabler, AADLEnabler, MontiArcEnabler, MontiArcAutomatonEnabler, SysMLStateMachinesEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]
instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams for structural components of the first vertical axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance ACMEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME architecture description for system components and interfaces",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEEnabler
]
instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL architecture description for system components and interfaces",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLEnabler
]
instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc architecture description for system composition and interconnections",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]
instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling of the first vertical axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomatonEnabler
]
instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for dynamic behavior of the first vertical axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStateMachinesEnabler
]
instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model for detailed dynamic simulation of the first vertical axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance MABIMAXFirstVerticalAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First vertical robot axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, critical for motion accuracy and friction dynamics modeling",
    base:contains MABIMAXFirstAxisActuator, FirstVerticalAxisSensors
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming sensor data; no details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols are provided."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML for model-based systems engineering, ACME, AADL, and MontiArc for architecture description languages (ADLs), which specify component & connector perspectives, interfaces, interconnections, and composition to ensure interoperability across heterogeneous stakeholders and modeling tools."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The safety cell of the robot restricts the maximum working range to [-90°, 90°], and the maximum achievable speed is |q˙max| = 75°/s."
]
